/nix/store/x45d95acx6rybkb5cidrxxffval9k2pg-gcc-wrapper-14.3.0/bin/gcc -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/vterm-module.dir/link.d -shared  -o /home/ultrafeeder4/.config/emacs/elpaca/builds/vterm/vterm-module.so "CMakeFiles/vterm-module.dir/vterm-module.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vterm-module.dir/utf8.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vterm-module.dir/elisp.c.o"  /nix/store/26418glgc0mhiwjj50qv17f28lrad2nh-libvterm-neovim-0.3.3/lib/libvterm.so
